name: ClaudeBot
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && (cloudflared --version 2>/dev/null || (curl -fsSL https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64.deb -o /tmp/cloudflared.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/cloudflared.deb && rm /tmp/cloudflared.deb))
